subject: Deploy + verify justhodl-tail-hedge (the firm Tail Hedge Overlay - scenario-targeted convex protection sized so the worst stress scenario is pulled inside the soft loss limit)

checks.detail: worst=2020 COVID Crash (Feb-Mar 2020) loss=-13.2 soft=-12.0 hard=-20.0

tail_hedge.headline: HEDGE RECOMMENDED -- 2020 COVID Crash loses -13.2%, 1.2pp past the -12% soft limit. Size ~0.20% of book in equity crash protection; covers ~1.2% in the tail for ~0.94%/yr carry.
tail_hedge.cro_brief: A tail hedge is recommended. The binding scenario is 2020 COVID Crash (Feb-Mar 2020): it loses -13.2% of book, 1.2pp beyond the -12% soft loss limit. Sleeve: Equity crash protection (SPY/QQQ put spreads + VIX calls). Size roughly 0.20% of book in premium; at the sleeve's ~6.0x tail payoff that returns about 1.2% of book in the named scenario, pulling the worst case back to the soft limit. Carry: about 0.94% per year at the current regime (carry multiplier 1.31x). Tail payoff per year of carry is 1.3x. Regime stance: ACCUMULATE. Calm regime (score 31) -- protection is cheap; this is the window to build or roll the sleeve forward at low premium. Book context: net market beta 0.28, net exposure +42% -- this is the residual directional risk the sleeve is protecting.
